violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Store raw chicken away from raw beef in walk in cooler.--Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Store cookie dough away from raw beef in walk in cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Seal bare wood surfaces in walk in coolers and in kitchen.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Exposed rafters/studs.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Detail cleaning needed.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Areas of repair needed.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. Hang fly strips away from pizza cooler and meat grinder.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
